# .github

> Part of **BAFLP** — The Buenos Aires Framework for Artificial Legal Personhood.
> This README is mandatory metadata. Do not delete.

## Purpose
GitHub configuration: CI/CD workflows, issue and PR templates, discussions pointers.

## Contents
`workflows/` (build+deploy, link-check, release), `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`, `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`.

## Dependencies
Drives Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment.

## Future evolution
Adds CodeQL/security and scheduled link audits.
